SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label

Class FormulaTermLabel

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label.FormulaTermLabel
All Implemented Interfaces:
TermLabel, Named, SyntaxElement, TerminalSyntaxElement
public class FormulaTermLabel extends Object implements TermLabel
Label attached to a predicates for instance in postconditions, loop invariants or precondition checks of applied operation contracts.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    BEFORE_ID_SEPARATOR
    Separator between multiple before IDs.

    NAME
    The unique name of this label.
    static final String
    PROOF_COUNTER_NAME
    The name used in Services.getCounter(String) to keep track of the already used IDs.
    static final String
    PROOF_COUNTER_SUB_PREFIX
    The prefix of the name used in Services.getCounter(String) to keep track of the already used sub IDs.

  • Constructor Details

    • FormulaTermLabel

      public FormulaTermLabel(String id) throws TermLabelException
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique ID of this term label in the Sequent.
      Throws:
      TermLabelException - Occurred Exception in case that the given ID is not valid.

    • FormulaTermLabel

      public FormulaTermLabel(String id, String beforeIds) throws TermLabelException
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique ID of this term label in the Sequent.
      beforeIds - The optional previous IDs of the label this one is derived from separated by ";".
      Throws:
      TermLabelException - Occurred Exception in case that the given IDs are not valid.

    • FormulaTermLabel

      public FormulaTermLabel(int majorId, int minorId)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      majorId - The major part of the unique ID.
      minorId - The minor part of the unique ID.

    • FormulaTermLabel

      public FormulaTermLabel(int majorId, int minorId, Collection<String> beforeIds)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      majorId - The major part of the unique ID.
      minorId - The minor part of the unique ID.
      beforeIds - The optional previous ID of the label this one is derived from.

    • getTLChild

      public Object getTLChild(int i)
      Retrieves the i-th parameter object of this term label.

      A term label may have structure, i.e. can be parameterized.

      Specified by:
      getTLChild in interface TermLabel
      Parameters:
      i - the number of the parameter to retrieve ( 0 <= i < getChildCount())
      Returns:
      the selected parameter

    • getTLChildCount

      public int getTLChildCount()
      Gets the number of parameters of this term label.
      Specified by:
      getTLChildCount in interface TermLabel
      Returns:
      the number of parameters (a non-negative number)

      public static int getMajorId(String id) throws TermLabelException
      Returns the major part of the given ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID to extract its major part.
      Returns:
      The major part of the given ID.
      Throws:
      TermLabelException - Occurred Exception in case that the given ID is not valid.

    • getValidBeforeIds

      public static List<String> getValidBeforeIds(String beforeIds) throws TermLabelException
      Returns the optional previous IDs if they are all valid.
      Parameters:
      beforeIds - The String with the before IDs to analyze.
      Returns:
      The valid before IDs.
      Throws:
      TermLabelException - Occurred Exception in case that the given IDs are not valid.

    • newLabelSubID

      public static int newLabelSubID(Services services, FormulaTermLabel label)
      Creates a new label sub ID.

      services - The Services to use.
      label - The parent FormulaTermLabel which provides the major ID.

      The new label sub ID.
